title: ryymr
description: Automatic hang-up, automatic message reply, timed message posting
body:
# Main functions:
1. Can automatically execute instructions in a loop, with customizable settings for instructions and intervals.
2. Has an automatic reply function in case of absence.
3. Can automatically schedule and send messages at set times. 
# Required prerequisite modules:
1. Fabric API >= 0.117.0
2. Cloth Config API >= 17.0.144
3. Module Menu >= 13.0.2
